workflow_name: FDS CEO Agent — Morning Brief System
workflow_description: Overnight collector gathers data from 6 sources, Claude API formats into decision-ready morning brief email, reply handler parses decisions and writes back to memory system

risk_scores.step_name: Write raw payload to Open Brain as daily_brief

failure_mappings.rationale: Failure cascades to 5 downstream steps
failure_mappings.mitigation: Add per-step validation gate; implement circuit breaker pattern

failure_mappings.rationale: Failure cascades to 5 downstream steps
failure_mappings.mitigation: Add per-step validation gate; implement circuit breaker pattern

failure_mappings.rationale: Failure propagates to 3 downstream steps
failure_mappings.mitigation: Add output validation at this step; define a fallback branch for failure cases

failure_mappings.rationale: Long workflow with generation step risks context window saturation
failure_mappings.mitigation: Implement context summarization between steps; re-inject critical context at each generation step

failure_mappings.rationale: Generated content may appear correct but contain factual errors
failure_mappings.mitigation: Add automated factual-consistency checks; route edge-case outputs to human review queue

failure_mappings.rationale: Step depth or workflow length increases specification drift risk
failure_mappings.mitigation: Re-state task objective in system prompt at this step; add output diff against spec baseline

failure_mappings.rationale: Generation step builds on classified/looked-up data — may confirm incorrect upstream data
failure_mappings.mitigation: Cross-reference generated output against raw source data; add validation gate between lookup and generation

failure_mappings.rationale: Step has 1 tool — minimal selection ambiguity
failure_mappings.mitigation: Verify the single tool is invoked with correct parameters via parameter schema validation

failure_mappings.rationale: Failure affects 1 downstream step
failure_mappings.mitigation: Ensure the downstream step handles missing or malformed input gracefully

failure_mappings.rationale: Multi-step workflow may degrade context quality
failure_mappings.mitigation: Monitor output quality metrics across session length

failure_mappings.rationale: Late-stage step in long workflow prone to forgetting original specification
failure_mappings.mitigation: Periodic spec re-injection; compare outputs against original requirements at this checkpoint

failure_mappings.rationale: Failure propagates to 2 downstream steps
failure_mappings.mitigation: Add output validation at this step; define a fallback branch for failure cases

failure_mappings.rationale: Multi-step workflow may degrade context quality
failure_mappings.mitigation: Monitor output quality metrics across session length

failure_mappings.rationale: Action may complete successfully but with incorrect parameters
failure_mappings.mitigation: Log all action parameters with expected vs. actual diff; add post-action state validation

failure_mappings.rationale: Late-stage step in long workflow prone to forgetting original specification
failure_mappings.mitigation: Periodic spec re-injection; compare outputs against original requirements at this checkpoint

failure_mappings.rationale: Action step builds on classified/looked-up data — may propagate upstream errors without challenge
failure_mappings.mitigation: Assert expected data shape before executing action; log action parameters for post-hoc review

checkpoints.rationale: Irreversible customer-facing output should be verified post-action
checkpoints.implementation_detail: Review flagged interactions within 1 hour; prioritize by sentiment score

checkpoints.rationale: Long workflow benefits from periodic specification re-injection
checkpoints.implementation_detail: Weekly eval review; monthly spec refresh; compare output drift against baseline

optimizations.suggestion: Downgrade model from 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514' to 'claude-haiku-4-5' for classification task.
